rules.description: Layer dependency direction violates declared architectural boundaries.
Services should not directly depend on adapter implementations.
State/persistence dependencies from API layer should be mediated by orchestration/domain.
Cross-owner dependencies should cross explicit contracts/events boundaries.

issues.message: No API boundary stage was detected in reconstructed workflows.

root_causes.description: dependency_consistency::AST_DI_DIVERGENCE_TRACKED - AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.
evidence: message=AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.

root_causes.description: architectural_intent::ARCHITECTURE_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION - Architecture intent constraints were violated. Review layer direction, ownership boundaries, and orchestrator mediation rules.
evidence: message=Architecture intent constraints were violated. Review layer direction, ownership boundaries, and orchestrator mediation rules.

root_causes.description: causal_flow::MISSING_API_BOUNDARY - No API boundary stage was detected in reconstructed workflows.
evidence: message=No API boundary stage was detected in reconstructed workflows.

root_causes.description: topology_validation::CYCLE_POLICY_VIOLATION - Cycle nodes violate cycle allowance policy flags.
evidence: message=Cycle nodes violate cycle allowance policy flags.

root_causes.description: semantic_consistency::DUPLICATE_INTENT_CLUSTERS - Conceptually overlapping cross-context clusters suggest duplicated or fragmented domain intent.
evidence: message=Conceptually overlapping cross-context clusters suggest duplicated or fragmented domain intent.

root_causes.description: topology_validation::MISSING_ENTRYPOINTS - Some configured entrypoints were not found in canonical nodes.
evidence: message=Some configured entrypoints were not found in canonical nodes.

causal_chain.cause: Resolver inconsistency propagated into graph assembly.
causal_chain.effect: Graph build contained disconnected or unresolved dependency paths.

causal_chain.cause: Graph anomalies reduced reachability coverage and semantic coherence.
causal_chain.effect: Validation layers emitted ranked failure signals.

causal_chain.cause: dependency_consistency::AST_DI_DIVERGENCE_TRACKED - AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.

top_issues.message: dependency_consistency::AST_DI_DIVERGENCE_TRACKED - AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.
architectural_intent::ARCHITECTURE_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION - Architecture intent constraints were violated. Review layer direction, ownership boundaries, and orchestrator mediation rules.
causal_flow::MISSING_API_BOUNDARY - No API boundary stage was detected in reconstructed workflows.
topology_validation::CYCLE_POLICY_VIOLATION - Cycle nodes violate cycle allowance policy flags.
semantic_consistency::DUPLICATE_INTENT_CLUSTERS - Conceptually overlapping cross-context clusters suggest duplicated or fragmented domain intent.
topology_validation::MISSING_ENTRYPOINTS - Some configured entrypoints were not found in canonical nodes.

recommended_actions: Review AST versus DI drift and update resolver policies.
Enforce layer-direction, ownership boundaries, and orchestrator-mediated state-change rules.
Ensure workflow traces include API boundary execution points.
Add explicit cycle policy annotations or refactor cyclic ownership boundaries.
Merge duplicated conceptual clusters and align responsibilities to one owner/context.
Validate entrypoint configuration against canonical node IDs.

breakdown.formula: base_trust = structural*0.35 + topology*0.25 + resolver*0.25 + semantic*0.15; if execution_confidence < min_execution_confidence then trust_score = base_trust * execution_confidence

summary.primary_failure_mode: dependency_consistency::AST_DI_DIVERGENCE_TRACKED - AST and DI pair sets diverge; this is tracked as architecture drift.
